summary: Dongjak's most notable feature is 나경원 (Na Kyung-won)'s reclamation of 동작 을 after her 2020 defeat — a roughly 10-point rightward swing (45.04% → 54.01%). Na is a top-tier national PPP figure; her personal profile plus the broader anti-Yoon wave being locally resisted (Dongjak 을 bucked the DPK trend) mark this as a candidate-driven outcome. 동작 갑 stayed DPK (김병기 50.49%). Representative sub-district here: 동작 을.

issues.label: Na Kyung-won's profile
issues.description: Na is among the highest-profile PPP figures nationally; her 10-point swing back in 2024 is inseparable from her personal political identity.

issues.label: Counter-wave dynamic
issues.description: 2024's Seoul pattern was anti-Yoon; 동작 을 going PPP while the national wave went DPK suggests local/candidate factors dominated over mood.

issues.label: Gangnam-adjacent wealth pockets
issues.description: Sadang and Heuksuk areas include higher-income apartment clusters adjacent to Seocho/Gangnam; may contribute to structural PPP base distinct from northern Dongjak.
